cases.prompt: Next.js App Router 앱인데 use client 남발해서 하이드레이션 에러나. 서버 컴포넌트 경계 잡아줘.

assertions.text: Produces a Server/Client boundary decision table and a precheck grep for boundary smells
Addresses the hydration mismatch by moving 'use client' down the tree

cases.prompt: App Router data fetching and caching with streaming — what are the Next.js best practices?

assertions.text: Gives data-fetching + caching patterns (fetch revalidate, use cache, cacheLife/cacheTag)
Shows Suspense streaming and Server Action snippets plus edge-vs-node runtime guidance
